---
title: "Isolines"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  error: true
  include: true
---

{{< include src/00_libs.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_utils.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
makeIsoline = (params = {}) => {
  const {
    data = null,
    vizWidth = width,
    cellWidth = 18,
    cellHeight = 100,
    personWidth = 10,
    personHeight = 100,
    persPerLineValue = Math.floor(vizWidth / cellWidth) - 1,
    defaultShapes = "abcdefghilmnopqSBDEGHIJKLNOPRSTVWXYZ",
    defaultFillHighlight = "steelblue",
    defaultFillNormal = "#ddd"
  } = params;

  // Create a row for each data item
  const rows = data.map((item, rowIndex) => {
    const highlightValue = item.value;
    const shapes = item.shapes || defaultShapes;
    const fillHighlight = item.fillHighlight || defaultFillHighlight;
    const fillNormal = item.fillNormal || defaultFillNormal;
    const highlightCountValue = Math.round(persPerLineValue * highlightValue);

    // Generate person with custom alphabet
    const generatePersonCustom = seed => {
      const avatarChoices = shapes;
      const id = "person_" + d3.format("0>4")(seed) + "_row" + rowIndex;
      const avatar =
        avatarChoices[parseInt(md5(id).slice(0, 2), 16) % avatarChoices.length];
      return {
        id,
        avatar,
        highlight: seed < highlightCountValue ? true : false
      };
    };

    // Render person with custom colors
    const renderPersonCustom = (p) => {
      const fillColor = p.highlight ? fillHighlight : fillNormal;
      const strokeColor = "#fff";

      return svg`
        <g class="person">
          <text baseline-shift="-${personHeight}px"
            style="font-size: ${personHeight}px; font-family: Isotype"
            fill="${fillColor}"
            stroke="${strokeColor}"
            stroke-width="3">
            ${p.avatar}
          </text>

        <text baseline-shift="-${personHeight}px"
          style="font-size: ${personHeight}px; font-family: Isotype;"
          fill="${fillColor}">
            ${p.avatar}
        </text>
        </g>
      `;
    };

    // Create the SVG visualization for this row
    const people = d3.range(persPerLineValue).map(generatePersonCustom);
    const height = cellHeight;

    const vizSvg = html`
      <svg width="${vizWidth}" height="${height}">
        <g transform="translate(0, 80)">
          ${people.map(
            (p, i) => svg`
            <g transform="translate(${i * cellWidth}, 0)">
              ${renderPersonCustom(p)}
            </g>`
          )}
        </g>
      </svg>
    `;

    // Create the percentage span
    const percentageText = html`
      <span style="color: ${fillHighlight}; font-family: Jost;">
        ${Math.round(highlightValue * 100)} von 100
      </span>
    `;

    // Return row with label
    return html`
      <div style="margin-bottom: 6px;">
        <h3 style="font-family: Jost; margin: 0 0 0 0;">${item.key}</h3>
        ${percentageText}
        ${vizSvg}
      </div>
    `;
  });

  // Return all rows in a container
  return html`
    <div>
      ${rows}
    </div>
  `;
}
```

```{ojs}
// Example with custom parameters (commented out)
vizCustom = makeIsoline({
  persPerLineValue: 20,
  data: [
    { 
      key: "Frauen", 
      value: 0.75, 
      shapes: "Babcdefghilmnopq", 
      fillHighlight: "coral",
      fillNormal: "#eee"
    },
    { 
      key: "Männer", 
      value: 0.30, 
      shapes: "SDEGHIJKLNOPRSTVWZ",
      fillHighlight: "green",
      fillNormal: "#ddd"
    }
  ]
})
```

# Possible Icons

All possible Icons:

<p class="testIcons">ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ</p>

<p class="testIcons">abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz</p>

<p class="testIcons">1234567890</p>

<p class="testIcons">!"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_`{|}~</p>

<p class="testIcons">€£¥¢$</p>

<p class="testIcons">©®§°</p>

<p class="testIcons">ÀÁÂÃÄÅÆÇÈÉÊËÌÍÎÏÑÒÓÔÕÖØÙÚÛÜÝ</p>

<p class="testIcons">àáâãäåæçèéêëìíîïñòóôõöøùúûüý</p>

<!-- <p class="testIcons">abcdefghilmnopqSBDEGHIJKLNOPRSTVWXYZ<p> -->

<!-- ```{ojs}
// Example with custom parameters (commented out)
vizCustom2 = makeIsoline({
  persPerLineValue: 20,
  data: [
    { 
      key: "Frauen", 
      value: 0.75, 
      shapes: "abcdefghilmnopq", 
      fillHighlight: "coral",
      fillNormal: "#eee"
    },
    { 
      key: "Männer", 
      value: 0.30, 
      shapes: "SBDEGHIJKLNOPRSTVWZ",
      fillHighlight: "green",
      fillNormal: "#ddd"
    }
  ]
})
``` -->
